name: nodestorm
description: Visual architecture brainstorming with human decisions over MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Design systems on a shared visual canvas
interface.longDescription: Propose architecture graphs, collect human decisions, track session drift, and export the resulting design record through the local Nodestorm MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Use Nodestorm to design this system with me.
Put these architecture choices on the Nodestorm canvas.
Compare my Nodestorm sessions and export the decision record.
